tasks.instruction: Uzupelnij kazdy z ponizszych dialogow (1.1-1.6), wybierajac odpowiedz A, B lub C.

items.stem:
Doctor: What seems to be the problem today?
Patient: _________
options: A) I've had a sore throat since Monday.
B) Yes, I am the problem today.
C) The problem seems a doctor.

items.stem:
Patient: How often should I take this medicine?
Doctor: _________
options: A) Twice every the day for food.
B) You take twice medicine a day.
C) Three times a day, after meals.

items.stem:
Doctor: Does it hurt when I press here?
Patient: _________
options: A) Yes, it hurts a bit.
B) Yes, it hurt to press you.
C) No, I press here too.

items.stem:
Patient: Do you think I need to stay in bed?
Doctor: _________
options: A) No, you are needing the bed.
B) Yes, for a couple of days at least.
C) Yes, I stay in your bed too.

items.stem:
Doctor: Have you taken anything for the pain?
Patient: _________
options: A) Just some paracetamol this morning.
B) No, the pain takes anything.
C) Yes, I take the pain yesterday.

items.stem:
Patient: Thank you, doctor. Shall I come back next week?
Doctor: _________
options: A) Only come back if you don't feel better.
B) Only if you will felt better next week.
C) Yes, you shall come back myself.
